description.overview: Known for their unique felted coat that forms natural mats called flocks, Bergamascos are patient, intelligent herding dogs.
description.history: The Bergamasco Sheepdog originated in Italy.
description.temperament: Known for being patient, intelligent, eager.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their matted flocks (unique) coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Known for their unique felted coat that forms natural mats called flocks, Bergamascos are patient, intelligent herding dogs.
